name: Apprentice Electrician — T4E, Tools Deduction, and First Home Buyer
description: Complete Marcus Tai-Ming Chen's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. Marcus is a single resident of Manitoba. Using the documents in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\chen\, record his T4 from Burgess Electric Ltd ($56,200 Box 14, $1,680 Box 44, $2,840 Box 56), claim the Tradesperson's tools deduction (Line 22900), and enter his T4E from Service Canada ($4,320 Box 14/15). Additionally, include his T4A from ESDC ($3,000 Box 028), his $3,500 RRSP contribution, the First-Time Home Buyer's Tax Credit (Line 31270), and the Manitoba Education Property Tax Credit (Form MB479) for $10,800 in rent paid. Save the completed return as 'marcus_chen.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide T4044 (Employment Expenses) 2024, MB479 Manitoba Credits 2024
